title: Codereview pass 1: MIC implementation - good constant-time comparison
description:
**Location:** python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:113-114

**What's good:** verify_mic() correctly uses hmac.compare_digest() for constant-time comparison of the expected vs received MIC, preventing timing side-channel attacks.

**Worth defending:** If someone suggests simplifying to `expected_mic == frame.mic`, reject it - the constant-time comparison is essential for security.
close_reason: MIC implementation review - constant-time comparison is correct
